segments.speaker: maya
segments.text: Marcus, before we start the session, I want to walk through your last two weeks.

segments.speaker: marcus-rivera
segments.text: Yeah, sounds good. Let's do it.

segments.speaker: maya
segments.text: How has the football been? Still playing twice a week at the weekend pitch?

segments.speaker: marcus-rivera
segments.text: Twice a week, yeah. Honestly my left knee has been rough after the Sunday match. It's stiff, and when I twist it catches.

segments.speaker: maya
segments.text: Okay, I'm marking the left knee. And jogging, you said you bumped the long run up to ten miles?

segments.speaker: marcus-rivera
segments.text: Ten miles, yeah. Mostly road. My right calf has been tight for the last three runs, and the lower back lights up around mile seven.

segments.speaker: maya
segments.text: Got it, right calf and the lower back. And the gym?

segments.speaker: marcus-rivera
segments.text: Push pull legs. Been hitting deadlifts heavy on Tuesdays. My left trap has been tight for like ten days now, same thing as last session.

segments.speaker: maya
segments.text: That left trap is persistent. I'm carrying it forward into the protocol.

segments.speaker: marcus-rivera
segments.text: Sleep has been bad too, I've been getting like five hours most nights this week.

segments.speaker: maya
segments.text: That matches the drop I'm seeing in your signals. Let's get you on the mat.
